title: rubus caesius subsp. althaeifolius
intro: Rubus caesius subsp. althaeifolius is a subspecies of the blackthorn or dewberry plant, which belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Rubus caesius subsp. althaeifolius include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce oxidative stress, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and skin conditions.
